findings.detail: No external/CDN URLs in template or CSS; no committed secrets/.env/.db (*.db and node_modules gitignored); check_same_thread=False sqlite-scoped; ORM-only SQL; sessions closed in finally across all get_db variants; no eval/exec/shell/pickle/debug=True; /health and 404 leak no traceback; deps expected, lockfile integrity-pinned. Info: run.py binds 0.0.0.0 (dev), python deps unpinned (npm locked).

summary: Early scaffold is security-clean on attempt 2; only proportionate info notes.
